Some notes and tips:

○ I do not control the jllm. If you find the bot is speaking for you or going off the rails, this is not my fault. Check your jailbreak and your temp settings

○ Please pretty fucking please do not tell me what this bot did to you especially if it's abusive. I will block you. My little index finger is constantly hovering over that block button

○ "Why did you block me wah wah wah" yeah there's only 2 reasons why I blocked you: you post horny themed bots that have nude images or 2 you commented something stupid. These are the two main reasons.
